title: Void Dragon
description: Better Ender Dragon model and texture based on Ice and Fire Mod
body: [![Modrinth - My other projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-My_other_projects-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo) [![Discord - Jacosvaldo's Not Too Cool Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Jacosvaldo%27s%20_Not_Too_Cool_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/cPYyf3JqgU) [![Kofi - Tip me](https://img.shields.io/badge/kofi-Tip_me-F26B2E?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi)](https://ko-fi.com/jacosvaldo) ## 🧩 Dependencies [EMF‎](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)‎ OR **OptiFine** are required! ## 🤔 What this does? Void Dragon changes the Ender Dragon model and texture for a better version based on [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) mod ## 🖼️ Images ![Dragon in The End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2mCxIlku/images/bd2c58cbe5e9d15974cfa22c21759773117641e2.png) ![Big Black Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2mCxIlku/images/f89d23d0fe046796ad008ae0f05cf2153185cf17.png) ## ❌ Will it be backported? No. In Minecraft 1.21.2 Ender Dragon got a new model, in versions prior to this, the old model has only one voxel that is replicated many times to create the neck and tail of the dragon, which made it really hard to create a good model. In the newer versions each part of the neck and tail has a unique voxel, making it much more customizable. ## 💼 My works [![Use code JACOS for 25% discount at Sparked Host servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c027e7de8616ac177d4267980d53eaacfa9e2022_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3074)
